data.body: 1edf implemented: subtree-aware referencing-commit precheck in transition_close.py. Held-out TDD 5/5 GREEN + existing gate suite 26 GREEN (31 total). Teeth: MUT1 parent-blind caught by parent+grandchild tests; MUT2 disable-guard caught by both blocks tests (strengthened leaf test with message-assert to catch it). lint+typecheck OK; verified transition_close stays lean (no eager pydantic_ai). Committed 22827a7ae. Pushing to Gerrit.
